case_title: AMERICAN GENERAL FINANCE vs. QUENIAHAN, JR., LEANDRO S.

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN GENERAL FINANCE AS TO DEFENDANT QUENIAHAN, JR., LEANDRO S.
